special_mechanics.name: Character-specific special moves
special_mechanics.description: Each character possesses unique special attacks tied to their archetype (e.g., Tiny's medicine ball, Googoo's spiked rattle and bottle throw, Nana Man's rising kick, Octohead's cartwheels and headspin). Evil counterparts have different attack patterns.

special_mechanics.name: Evil twin mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Each playable character has an unlockable evil counterpart with identical sprites but different battle stances, attack properties, colors, and fighting styles

tier_notes: Tier 3 qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article which focuses on story, characters, and game history rather than physics mechanics. No movement parameters, gravity values, jump physics, or sub-pixel system information is documented in available sources.
